title: Sloth's Cursed Blocks
description: A datapack + resource pack to add some cursed blocks into the game
body:
![Preview of Cursed blocks - Stone furnace, Upside down grass, and a crafting table that looks like an Oak Log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14445a60eda8eb1672c23a792cc6ee0ba39525a8_0.webp) 

A simple yet cursed datapack which adds some slightly cursed yet functional custom blocks.
All blocks based on either existing vanilla content [such as the stone furnace] or proposed or scrapped vanilla content [such as the rubies]

Currently contains:

Crafting Table Log (Crafted with 2 oak logs, gives 2 crafting tables)

Stone Furnace (Crafted with 8 stone, in the arrangement of a standard furnace)

Deepslate Furnace (Crafted with 8 Deepslate)

Upside down grass block (Crafted with 1 grass block)

Upside down podzol

Upside down path

Upside down mycelium

Stripped Oak Chest (Chest that looks like stripped oak log)

Ruby Block (crafted with 9 rubies)

Rubies (spawn in most chests)

Thicc Torches

Thicc Soul Torches

Thicc Redstone Torches

Thicc Copper Torches

![Upside Down Grass Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25571dd1cc0d312821c1f7db3899424ba89f2e2e_0.webp)

These blocks are sure to cause confusion and hilarity with you and your friends.

The furnace, and the crafting table, and any other functional blocks still function as their regular, non cursed counterparts would otherwise.

![Stone Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f54c6afc5ea97356f6d4b735137568f9e65ee497_0.webp)
